name: Troptions Tranche A
description: Tranche A is the senior class of the Troptions XLS-33 Multi-Purpose Token (MPT) series. Each unit represents a unit of evidence-bound proof-gated capacity within the Troptions institutional operating infrastructure platform. Tranche A units are issued by a cold issuer wallet under multisig control and are transferred only to addresses that have completed XRPL MPTokenAuthorize handshake with the issuer.

compliance.legalNotice: Troptions Tranche A MPT units are not a security, a stablecoin, a redeemable instrument, or a payment instrument. Holding, transferring, or trading these units is at the holder's sole risk. Issuer reserves clawback authority for compliance reversals only.
